title: oenothera runcinata var. leucotricha
intro: Oenothera runcinata var. leucotricha, also known as Evening Primrose, is a perennial herb native to North America, characterized by its white, pink, or yellow flowers. The plant is rich in gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), a polyunsaturated fatty acid with anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Oenothera runcinata var. leucotricha include reducing symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes, and alleviating symptoms of skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant include oil extracts, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
